steps.title: Find the table row
steps.content: The table gives wind chill values for pairs of air temperature and wind speed. Use the row for an air temperature of $33^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Read the matching entry
steps.content: In that row, use the column for a wind speed of $20$ miles per hour. The problem says to disregard the degree symbol. The answer is 21.
